questions.question: By noon, I {a1} for two hours.

a1.verb_hint: For two hours marks duration up to a future point.

variants: By noon, I {a1} for two hours.

questions.question: By Friday, she {a1} here since Monday.

a1.verb_hint: Since Monday gives the start point.

variants: By Friday, she {a1} here since Monday.

a1.verb_hint: By next year plus duration selects Future Perfect Continuous.

variants: By next year, we {a1} together for five years.

questions.question: By the time you arrive, they {a1} all morning.
